Working with Code

Inline code example: const x = 42;

Another inline: document.querySelector()

Block code:

function greet(name) {
  return `Hello, ${name}!`;
}

console.log(greet('World'));

With language (should ignore for now):

const array = [1, 2, 3];
array.map(x => x * 2);

Pre without code tag:

Plain preformatted text
with multiple lines
